raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The budget plan protects education funding at $108.3 billion with a $3.4 billion increase for Prop 98 Local Control Funding Formula.",
    "The budget adds $100 million to support the Multi-family Housing Program and $50 million for the Cal Home Program to help address the housing crisis in California.",
    "The budget restores funding to protect the coast from sea level rise by $378.2 million.",
    "The budget adds $25 million for urban greening to reduce the impact of greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "The budget protects funding by $75 million for the extreme heat and community resilience program.",
    "The budget restores $360 million in individual coverage mandate penalty funds to reduce lower- and middle-income Californians' health plan costs in Covered California.",
    "The budget allocates $250,000 to the Port of San Diego for the electrification of cargo handling equipment at the B Street Cruise Terminal.",
    "The budget allocates $350,000 to the City of Carlsbad for State Street Parking Lot EV Charging stations."
  ]
}
```
